featured_projects.title: StressIntel PRO
featured_projects.description: Explainable AI stress diagnostics platform with SHAP interpretability and OpenCV analytics.
featured_projects.problem: Traditional stress assessments rely on manual surveys and lack real-time explainability.
featured_projects.solution: Built an Explainable AI platform using machine learning, SHAP, and behavioral analytics to generate real-time stress predictions.

featured_projects.title: ResumeAnalyzer-XAI
featured_projects.description: ATS resume screening platform supporting 20+ job categories with explainable scoring.
featured_projects.problem: Candidates struggle to understand why resumes fail ATS systems.
featured_projects.solution: Built a machine learning platform that scores resumes and explains missing skills using SHAP.

featured_projects.title: InterviewGPT
featured_projects.description: AI interview preparation platform powered by RAG and LLM workflows.
featured_projects.problem: Interview preparation is generic and not personalized.
featured_projects.solution: Developed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform that creates customized interview experiences.

featured_projects.title: Enterprise Booking Engine
featured_projects.description: Scalable booking and transaction management platform.
featured_projects.problem: Businesses struggle with fragmented booking workflows.
featured_projects.solution: Designed a modular enterprise-grade booking and transaction management system.

highlights: Worked with Decathlon, RedBus, AbhiBus, Nescafe, Amul and Barista.
Managed finances across 15+ major university events.
Led cross-functional teams of over 100 student volunteers.
